title: How to Repurpose a Podcast into 10+ Social Media Posts
excerpt: Learn the exact process to turn a single podcast episode into tweets, LinkedIn posts, Instagram carousels, audiograms, and more — saving hours of content creation time.
content:
## Why Repurpose Your Podcast?

You spent hours recording, editing, and publishing a podcast episode. But if you're only publishing it as audio, you're leaving **90% of its value on the table**.

The average podcast episode contains enough material for 10-15 pieces of social media content. Here's how to extract every drop of value.

## The 10-Piece Framework

### 1. Pull Key Quotes (3-5 Posts)

Every episode has quotable moments. Identify the most impactful 1-2 sentence quotes and turn them into:
- **Twitter/X posts** with the quote + episode link
- **Instagram quote cards** with branded design
- **LinkedIn text posts** with context around the quote

### 2. Create Audiograms (2-3 Posts)

Short 30-60 second audio clips with waveform visuals perform incredibly well:
- Pick the most engaging segments
- Add captions (85% of social video is watched muted)
- Optimize dimensions for each platform

### 3. Write a Thread (1 Post)

Summarize your episode's key takeaways in a Twitter/X thread:
- Start with a hook that makes people stop scrolling
- One takeaway per tweet
- End with a CTA to listen to the full episode

### 4. Blog Post Summary (1 Post)

Transcribe and edit into a blog post:
- Great for SEO
- Reaches people who prefer reading
- Can be further repurposed into newsletters

### 5. Short-Form Video (2-3 Posts)

Extract the best moments and create:
- **TikTok clips** (30-60 seconds)
- **YouTube Shorts** (vertical, punchy)
- **Instagram Reels** (with trending audio overlay)

## The Time-Saving Secret

Doing this manually takes 4-6 hours per episode. With **RepurposeAI**, you upload your podcast and get all 10+ pieces generated in minutes. The AI understands context, identifies the best moments, and formats everything for each platform.

## Start Repurposing Today

Stop creating content from scratch every day. Let your best ideas work harder for you. Try RepurposeAI free and turn your next podcast episode into a week's worth of social media content.
